message.content:
@startuml

participant "FragmentVideoChat" as FVC
participant "LicodeConnector" as LC
participant "PeerConnectionFactory" as PCF
participant "RoomObserver" as RO
participant "MediaStream" as MS
participant "PeerConnection" as PC
participant "StreamDescription" as SD
participant "LicodeSdpObserver" as LSO
participant "LicodeServer" as LS
participant "SocketIOClient" as SOC

== Init ==

FVC -> FVC : configureConnector
FVC -> LC : init
LC -> PCF : initializeAndroidGlobals
FVC -> LC : addObserver(RoomObserver)

== Publish ==

FVC -> FVC : startCastView.onClick
FVC -> LC : requestPublish
LC -> RO : triggerPublishAllowed
RO -> FVC : onPublishAllowed

FVC -> FVC : startPublish
FVC -> FVC : makeVideoView
FVC -> LC : publish(VideoStreamsView)
LC -> LC : doPublish

== Publish-create media ==

LC -> MS : createLocalMediaStream
LC -> LC : createMediaConstraints
LC -> LC : setVideoCapturer
LC -> PCF : createVideoSource(VideoCapturer, MediaConstraints)
LC -> MS : createVideoTrack(String, VideoSource)
LC -> MS : addTrack
LC -> PCF : createAudioSource(MediaConstraints)
LC -> MS : createAudioTrack(String, AudioSource)
LC -> MS : addTrack

== Publish-create offer ==

LC -> LC : makePcConstraints
LC -> LSO : create MyPcObserver
LC -> PCF : createPeerConnection(List<IceServer>, MediaConstraints, Observer)
LC -> PC : addStream(MediaStream, MediaConstraints)
LC -> LC : setMedia
LC -> LC : attachRenderer
LC -> PC : initLocal(PeerConnection, SdpObserver)
PC -> PC : createOffer
PC -> LSO : onCreateSuccess
PC -> PC : setLocalDescription
PC -> LSO : onSetSuccess
LSO -> LSO : sendLocalDescription
LSO -> LSO : sendSDP(Socket("publish"))
LSO -> LS : publish
LS -> LSO : publish success
LSO -> PC : setRemoteDescription

== Subscribe ==

== Subscribe-token ==

FVC -> FVC : startVideoChat
FVC -> FVC : createToken\nhttp\nLoad Balance
FVC -> FVC : createToken success
FVC -> LC : connect
LC -> LC : createToken
LC -> LC : decodeToken
LC -> SOC : connect to server\nsocket
SOC -> LC : onConnectCompleted

== Subscribe-listen socket events ==

LC -> SOC : listen events\nonAddStream\nonSubscribeP2P\nonPublishP2P\nonDataStream\nonRemoveStream\ndisconnect
LC -> SOC : sendMessageSocket("token")
SOC -> LC : token success
LC -> FVC : onRoomConnected
LC -> FVC : setBandwidthLimits

alt has streams
LC -> LC : triggerStreamAdded
LC -> RO : mOnAddStream
RO -> RO : triggerStreamAdded
end

FVC -> FVC : onStreamAdded
FVC -> LC : subscribe
LC -> LC : doSubscribe
LC -> LC : triggerMediaAvailable

FVC -> FVC : onStreamMediaAvailable
FVC -> FVC : makeVideoView
FVC -> LC : attachRenderer
LC -> LC : attachRenderer
LC -> LSO : create MyPcObserver
LC -> PCF : createPeerConnection
LC -> PC : initRemote(PeerConnection, SdpObserver)
PC -> PC : createOffer
PC -> LSO : onCreateSuccess
PC -> PC : setLocalDescription
PC -> LSO : onSetSuccess
LSO -> LSO : sendLocalDescription
LSO -> LSO : sendSDP(Socket("subscribe"))
LSO -> LS : subscribe success
LSO -> PC : setRemoteDescription

@enduml
